title: Stavanger Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Stavanger with a Z-Score of -3.46. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stavanger are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The HDD value of 13.1 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity of 77% and wind speed of 18.7 km/h are also contributing factors to the harsh conditions.
conclusion: Operators should take immediate action to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
